TextENGNew: Sleepy.
``Whoa... That was a really big yawn, Keiichi-kun.``
Eating usually wakes me right up, but... today it just wasn't working.
``I was up late watching TV last night... and now I'm just... so tired...``
``Was there some kind of show you'd enjoy on last night?``
``H-H-How utterly indecent~!!``
``Hold on! Don't just jump to conclusions on your own!!!``
``...It's perfectly normal for boys. There's nothing to be ashamed of.``
Rika-chan's headpats were anything but reassuring—they only made things worse.
``Could you just... let me crash for this lunch break?@k@vS01/01/120100159. ...Seriously, please.``
``Oh my, did you really think I would simply let that happen?``
``Bother me and I'll be mad.@k@vS01/01/120100161. Really mad!@k@vS01/01/120100162. ...Yaaawwnn...``
Not that I sounded the least bit intimidating.
Anyway... so... sleepy...
I planted my face on the desk without another word and committed to a nap.
Satoko seemed to be saying something back, but I pretended not to hear her.
``...Stop it, Satoko-chan.@k@vS01/02/120200053. Keiichi-kun's already asleep.@k@vS01/02/120200054. ...His sleeping face... so kyute.☆``
``You can take him home later.@k@vS01/03/120300059. Just let him rest for now.``
``...Let's move somewhere else.@k@vS01/05/120500017. We shouldn't be loud around Keiichi.``
...Rika-chan really is a sweet girl...
``Let's not wake him even if the teacher comes back.``
I take that back.
The part about staying up late watching TV... was a lie.
I'd turned off the lights at the usual time, but... Ooishi-san's words from that afternoon kept running through my head, and I couldn't fall asleep at all.
Spending the day like this... it was almost as if the incident with Tomitake-san had never happened.
...I even found myself wondering whether Ooishi-san had been deceiving me all along.
But... it was probably real.
...And it was something I couldn't tell anyone about.
He'd asked for my cooperation, but... I didn't know anything useful anyway.
If I wasn't going to be any help, I wished he'd never told me about it in the first place.
In the end, I'd gone and done it again... learning something I didn't need to know, only to regret it...
If I'd never found out, I'd surely be horsing around with everyone right now, enjoying lunch like any other day.
...I couldn't help but resent Ooishi-san for all of this.
``...Huh? ...Since when?``
``He was already gone the very next day.@k@vS01/03/120300061. ...Apparently he vanished the night of the Watanagashi.``
Mion kept her voice low, as if checking to make sure no one else could hear—but every word reached me clearly.
Rena's voice, on the other hand, was harder to make out.
Even so, the anxiety in her tone came through unmistakably.
...Could they be... talking about Tomitake-san...?!
``...nly... itake?``
``Not sure.@k@vS01/03/120300063. That's all I know.``
Since I was keeping the incident with Tomitake-san locked away inside, I had to feign complete ignorance about this topic.
Rather than getting up, joining the conversation, and piling lie upon lie, it was far easier to just keep pretending to sleep and listen in.
But... why was I lying here pretending to be asleep, eavesdropping on my own friends...?
The guilt... stung.
``...So... and me... there are others, right?@k@vS01/02/120200058. ...too.``
``...They don't know whether she fell victim to the curse or was spirited away by demons...``
Onikakushi...?@k Oni-kakushi...?@k Spirited away... by demons?
It was a strange word.
...But I could tell it was steeped in something deeply ominous.
``...eah... either way... there's another one, right?@k@vS01/02/120200060. ...right?``
``If it's Oyashiro-sama's doing... then yes.``
``But, but...!@k@vS01/02/120200062. ...This year, they haven't... at all...?``

``Grandma and the village chief were talking about it.@k@vS01/03/120300067. ...Apparently they worked things out with the police beforehand this year.@k@vS01/03/120300068. ...They agreed to handle whatever happens quietly, without making a scene.``
``Then... without our knowing... somewhere, someone may have already... you mean...?``
``...Next... it could be... Rena... couldn't it...``
``...Don't worry.@k@vS01/03/120300071. You came back safe and sound.``
``...but... that one... didn't make it, right...?``
``That was a long time ago.@k@vS01/03/120300073. Let's drop this.``
The mood turned awkward, and both of them fell silent.
The conversation had been fragmentary at best, but... several things caught my attention.
First, the word 'Onikakushi.'
...From the way it was used and the surrounding context—'to be Onikakushi'd'—it seemed equivalent to 'kamikakushi,' being spirited away.
...The fact that the woman who had been with Tomitake-san (it gnawed at me that I couldn't remember her name...) had vanished after the Watanagashi supported that interpretation.
The next thing that stuck out was Rena's words: 'There's another one, right?'
Mion had also added, 'If it's Oyashiro-sama's, then yes.'
If it was Oyashiro-sama's curse... did that mean there were always two victims...?
Come to think of it, I recalled Mion saying at the start that they didn't know whether it was the curse or an Onikakushi.
The curse and Onikakushi appeared to be different things—paired 'phenomena' that always occurred together...
I thought back to Tomitake-san's gruesome end...
That was nothing so clean as a disappearance.@k ...His horrific death deserved no other word than 'curse.'
Then... the woman who was with him... did she vanish because she was 'demoned away'...?
One thing I now understood... the curse always seemed to claim an even number of victims.
And... the last thing that troubled me was Rena.
Rena had been frightened.
...I didn't know why.
But she seemed to have some reason to believe she was a likely target of Oyashiro-sama's curse...
Oyashiro-sama... if I remembered correctly, was supposed to be Hinamizawa's guardian deity.
...Wasn't a guardian deity supposed to protect the villagers and drive away outside threats...?
Just as Ooishi-san had said yesterday, the targets were originally enemies of the village—but in recent years, any outsider was fair game.
But if that was the case... then I should be a more likely target than Rena, having moved here even more recently.
And yet, from Rena's demeanor, I could sense an almost tragic certainty that she would be next...
...Should I pass along what I'd just heard to Ooishi-san?
Reporting to the police what I'd overheard while pretending to sleep, eavesdropping on my friends...
...The thought only made me feel worse.
Question after question piled up, wrapping me in a dark cloud of unease...
Would it be better... not to seek the answers...?
Just as before, the more I learned, the deeper I sank—past the point of no return...
Someday, I was sure I would regret this.
...I would regret ever having learned any of it...
``The teacher's coming~!!@k@vS01/04/120400028. Keiichi-saan!@k@vS01/04/120400029. Wake up!!``
I heard the distant ring of the handbell signaling the start of afternoon classes.@k ...Damn! I barely slept at all!
I snapped awake and lifted my head in a hurry.
The moment I leaned back against my chair—
A thumbtack had been taped to the back of my seat while I was asleep.
...Circumstantial evidence was more than enough...!!
``SATOKOoOoOOo!!!``
Guilty without trial!!
I sentence you to the maximum penalty!!!!
I shot up from my seat!!
...and immediately tripped and fell.
At some point, someone had tied my shoelaces together!
``N-Not bad, Satokoooo!!@k@vS01/01/120100166. To think you could erase your presence while I slept and pull off something this elaborate...!!!``
The teacher walked in right as I was about to kick off my shoes and lunge at Satoko.
``Oh ho ho!!@k@vS01/04/120400031. The teacher has arrived, Keiichi-san!@k@vS01/04/120400032. Please, take your seat~!``
*clomp clomp*@k@|@y *whisk*@k@|@y *flick!!*
I didn't care one bit—I marched right over and flicked her on the forehead.
``B-Bwaaaaaah!!@k@vS01/04/120400034. Keiichi-san is being mean to me...!!``
``Hey!@k@vS01/22/121400013. Maebara-kun, don't bully the younger students!@k@vS01/22/121400014. Apologize to her!``
I saw Satoko sticking her tongue out at me... That little brat!!!
``Come on! Maebara-kun!?``
``Yeah, yeah, I'll apologize.@k@vS01/01/120100168. I'm sorry, Satoko-san.``
It was a completely flat, monotone delivery, but at least I apologized.
...Just you wait, Satoko!!
``Kei-chan, Kei-chan, save that grudge for club activities!@k@vS01/03/120300075. Sit down, sit down.``
Prompted by Mion in class-representative mode, I reluctantly took my seat.
After the tedious afternoon classes finally ended, school was out for the day.
So, what are we playing for today's club activities?!
Personally... I wanted another crack at yesterday's deduction game.
...I barely got to play last time because of Ooishi-san.
Rena and I never even got to try out our formation!
``That's right. Today, Keiichi-kun and I are going to win big!``
``I wonder about that...@k@vS01/04/120400036. We've never played the same game two days in a row.``
``...Why not try asking Mii?``
I turned to look at Mion, and the moment our eyes met, she slapped her palm and exclaimed—
``Oops!@k@vS01/03/120300077. I totally forgot—I have to help out at my uncle's place today...!@k@vS01/03/120300078. Sorry, everyone! No club today!``
``Helping your uncle~?@k@vS01/01/120100170. How uncharacteristically dutiful of you!``
``Sorry, really...!@k@vS01/03/120300080. I completely forgot... Well then, sorry, guys!@k@vS01/03/120300081. This old man's heading home!``
With just that one-sided announcement, Mion snatched up her bag and clattered off toward the exit.
``Mii-chan sometimes goes into town to help out at her uncle's shop.``
Huh... I'd have thought she was the last person to take on something that bothersome.
``She said she gets paid for it.@k@vS01/04/120400038. Apparently it's quite a bit of spending money.``
I see.@k So that's how she pays for that mountain of games.
``But wait... wouldn't you call that a part-time job?@k@vS01/01/120100172. Isn't that against school rules?!``
``...The rules say household chores are exempt.``
Well, if you want to call it that...
...So then what?@k Club's cancelled for today?
``...So... I guess we're done for today? ...I guess?``
``It's fine without the club president, right?@k@vS01/01/120100174. ...Come on, let's do club activities!``
I opened the club locker and began digging through the towering pile of games, searching for yesterday's game.
``Oh, here it is!@k@vS01/01/120100176. The deduction game from yesterday!@k@vS01/01/120100177. I had to quit just when I was starting to get the hang of it~``
At the very least, I needed to get Satoko back for what she pulled at lunch!!
``I don't mind.@k@vS01/04/120400040. What about Rena-san and Rika?``
``Hmm... if Keiichi-kun really wants to that badly... I guess a little while would be okay.``
``...I think... it would be better to wait until everyone's here.``
Mm... when she puts it that way... hmm.
``If there's no club today, I wanted to go shopping.@k@vS01/05/120500023. ...I need to buy soy sauce and things.``
``Oh! ...That's right!@k@vS01/04/120400042. I completely forgot about that.``
``Well then... I think Rena will go treasure hunting for the first time in a while...!``
What's going on? ...The mood had completely shifted away from club activities.
If I pushed any harder, they might catch on that I had a strategy up my sleeve...
...Oh well. I'll let it go this time.
``Aw man, I was really looking forward to that game...``
I flipped through the cards, looking reluctant to let go.
``I shall give you a thorough thrashing next time!@k@vS01/04/120400044. Oh ho ho!!``
``The culprit is 'Satoko'!@k@vS01/01/120100180. The weapon is the 'Pistol'!@k@vS01/01/120100181. I knew it was you all along!!``
``Wh-What did you say?!@k@vS01/04/120400046. Then, then, then!!``
Satoko rifled through the cards on the desk and thrust three of them in my face.
``The culprit is 'Keiichi'!@k@vS01/04/120400048. The weapon is the 'Rope,' and the scene of the crime is the 'Lounge'!!``
``Who needs a rope!@k@vS01/01/120100183. I'll strangle you with my bare hands!!``
``Nooooo!!@k@vS01/04/120400050. Keiichi-san, you beast!!!!``
Phew.@k ...Well, at least I got that out of my system.
``Bwaaaaaah!!@k@vS01/04/120400052. You'll pay for this, Keiichi-san!!``
``...He was so, so mean to you.@k@vS01/05/120500025. Poor thing, poor thing.``
``Ahahaha☆ ...So kyute, so kyute...☆``
Everyone began packing up to head home.
I gathered up the scattered cards to put them away.
My hand suddenly stopped.@k ...They were just suspect cards, and yet... something felt off.
``Rena``@k ``Satoko``@k ``Rika``@k ``Keiichi``@k ``Mion``@k@|@y ``Satoshi.``
Satoshi?
...The names on the suspect cards weren't made up.
At least, every name besides this one belonged to a club member.
...Then was this 'Satoshi' also... a member?
Was there anyone in the class named Satoshi...?
I scanned the class roster posted on the wall, but found no one by that name.
``Keiichi-kun, hurry up and finish cleaning!``
Rena's urging snapped me out of it.
Satoko and Rika-chan had already headed cheerfully toward the shoe lockers, leaving just the two of us in the classroom.
Rena herself had her bag slung over her shoulder, ready to go.
``Rena.@k@vS01/01/120100185. I imagine quite a few students have transferred out of this school over the years... right?``
I tried asking Rena in a roundabout way.
She made a slightly troubled face before answering.
``...Yeah.@k@vS01/02/120200074. Hinamizawa's pretty rural, right?@k@vS01/02/120200075. People do transfer away every now and then.``
``Then, did this Satoshi guy transfer out too?``
``Sorry!@k@vS01/02/120200077. ...I don't really know.``
There was a brief pause, but her answer was nearly instant.

``Oh, um... I'm not trying to be evasive!@k@vS01/02/120200079. ...It was right around last year.@k@vS01/02/120200080. I transferred in, and I think he left around the same time.@k@vS01/02/120200081. So I never really got to talk to him.@k@vS01/02/120200082. ...Sorry!``
'I don't really know, sorry.'
Her answer was strikingly similar to when I'd asked her about the murder and she'd shut me out.
Being rejected like that made me feel lonely... and just a little bit angry.
I'm... one of them, aren't I?
Friends... aren't supposed to keep secrets from each other, are they?
I could appreciate them shielding me from the unnerving talk of curses.
...But... if everyone was worried, I wanted to share in that worry too.
...Isn't that... what being friends is all about...?
With sadness and frustration swirling together inside me... I wondered what kind of face I was making right then...
``K-Keiichi-kun... you're making a scary face.@k@vS01/02/120200084. ...I wonder why? ...Why?``
It was probably exactly the kind of face she said it was.
...Rena seemed frightened by my grim expression.
``Oh, sorry.@k@vS01/01/120100188. ...I was really looking forward to club today. I'm just disappointed, that's all.``
I ruffled Rena's hair to deflect.
``Let's head home.``
Still dragging that awkward tension between us, we started for home.
Why?
...Why had everything been leaving such a bad taste in my mouth lately...?
Back when I didn't know anything... I had nothing to worry about, and every day was simply fun.
My long, outstretched shadow gave no answer to that naive question.
``...Keiichi-kun, are you tired, maybe...? ...Maybe?``
Rena was cautiously studying my face.
...Her expression only made the awkward atmosphere even more uncomfortable.
``...You think so?``
``Y-Yeah.@k@vS01/02/120200087. ...You've seemed a little off ever since this morning.@k@vS01/02/120200088. Maybe you're... coming down with a cold?``
In that sense, I was pretty sure I was perfectly healthy.@k It might not look like it, but I'd had perfect attendance since elementary school.
Since I didn't answer right away, Rena continued on her own.

``I bet the exhaustion from moving has finally caught up with you.@k@vS01/02/120200090. ...This place is so different from where you used to live, after all.@k@vS01/02/120200091. With so much to get used to and learn... it's only natural to be worn out.``
``Maybe that's it.``
``Yeah.@k@vS01/02/120200093. I'm sure that's it.@k@vS01/02/120200094. Rena was the same way at first.@k@vS01/02/120200095. I can tell, you know? ...You know?``
I wondered if Rena had felt this same subtle sense of alienation last year.
...Thinking about it that way, I felt that Rena, of all people, might be the one who could understand how I felt.
``I'd love to hear about when you first transferred to Hinamizawa.@k@vS01/01/120100193. ...What was it like?``
When she noticed I'd taken an interest, Rena's face immediately brightened.

``Ahaha.@k@vS01/02/120200097. It was just like you, Keiichi-kun.@k@vS01/02/120200098. I didn't know anyone's names or my way around the village at all.@k@vS01/02/120200099. Mii-chan and the others were so kind that I was never lonely... but I still felt out of place.``
Rena told me all about when she'd first moved here.
Her first encounters and surprises, her worries and joys—all of it.
``So... Satoko got you too?!``

``Yeah.@k@vS01/02/120200101. When I went to sit down, there were thumbtacks on my chair.@k@vS01/02/120200102. A whole bunch of them.@k@vS01/02/120200103. ...And then, I... ...Yeah.@k@vS01/02/120200104. That really takes me back!``
``When did Mion invite you into the club?@k@vS01/01/120100196. Right away, on the first day?``

``Nope.@k@vS01/02/120200106. ...There was no club at first.@k@vS01/02/120200107. It started partway through.@k@vS01/02/120200108. ...One day she said we should all stay after school and have a big game tournament.``
``Come to think of it... Mion did say she was the founding president.@k@vS01/01/120100198. That makes sense.``
``Don't tell anyone, but Mii-chan was actually pretty bad at first.@k@vS01/02/120200110. She could never win.``
``What?!@k@vS01/01/120100200. Mion?!@k@vS01/01/120100201. ...I can't even imagine that!``
``She ended up having to do most of the penalty games she'd come up with herself.``
``Ahaha! Seriously, keep it a secret!``
Mion, of all people...!
...And from there, she gradually transformed into the kind of monster who'd use any means necessary to win.
Dirty play is where Mion truly shines!

``I started making friends besides Mii-chan, little by little... but, yeah.@k@vS01/02/120200114. It might have been after you moved here, Keiichi-kun.@k@vS01/02/120200115. That I finally felt like I truly belonged.``
Had Rena, too, been kept in the dark about Oyashiro-sama when she first arrived?
...Would I only be accepted as one of them once they finally told me about Oyashiro-sama?
``I wonder when they'll finally see me as one of them.``
``Huh?@k@vS01/02/120200117. What did you say?``
``...Ah, nothing.@k@vS01/01/120100204. Just thinking out loud.``
``Ahaha. You're a funny one, Keiichi-kun.``
Rena laughed brightly, but I couldn't bring myself to laugh along...
I stopped in my tracks.
Then... steeling my resolve, I spoke.
``Hey, Rena.@k@vS01/01/120100206. ...Everyone isn't keeping secrets from me or anything... right?``
``You're lying... aren't you?``
Rena stopped walking too.
Her expression was cold. Hard.
``What do you mean by that...?@k@vS01/02/120200122. ...Keiichi-kun?``
Her tone was still the same cheerful, slightly playful one as before.
``You are.@k@vS01/01/120100209. ...Keeping things from me.``
The moment Rena understood my meaning, her expression tightened.
...Seeing that look, I immediately regretted blurting something so careless.
...But her counterattack wasn't what I'd expected.
``Well then, Keiichi-kun.@k@vS01/02/120200124. ...Aren't you the one hiding things from us?``
Her tone hadn't changed... but it was an expression I'd never seen on Rena before.
A piercing gaze—utterly unlike Rena's—bore straight through both my eyes.
``Aren't you?@k@vS01/02/120200126. Lies or secrets...@k@vS01/02/120200127. ...Aren't you?``
You are, aren't you?@k Secrets...
...She didn't say it aloud... but that's what her eyes were telling me.
The incident with Tomitake-san... and the alienation I'd been feeling from the group.
...Without even searching my conscience... I knew I carried several guilty secrets...
But... I hadn't told everyone about Tomitake-san... because I was trying to be considerate.
...Just as they kept Oyashiro-sama from me out of consideration, I was keeping my own secrets...
Then... weren't we even...?!
``Liar.``
Her instant reply jolted me.
Rena was staring into me, unblinking.
Those eyes... were like a hawk's.
``...Why would you say I'm lying...?``
``You said the teacher called you to the staff room during yesterday's club meeting, didn't you?!@k@vS01/02/120200130. ...I know the truth.@k@vS01/02/120200131. You never went to the staff room.``
I swallowed hard...
It wasn't a bluff... because it was the truth.

``The teacher said you had a visitor, right?@k@vS01/02/120200133. But you didn't talk at the entrance.@k@vS01/02/120200134. You talked inside a car by the school gate.@k@vS01/02/120200135. With some man none of us know!``
Rena... knew everything...
That I'd been called out by Ooishi-san. That I'd sat in his car and been told about Tomitake-san. She knew... all of it?!
``Who was that man?``
``I-I don't know him...!``
``Then why did a stranger have business with you?``
``I-I'd like to know that myself!``
``Then what were you talking about?!``
``It had nothing to do with any of you...!``
Rena's scream echoed through the trees...
Startled birds burst into panicked flight.
I couldn't exhale the breath I'd drawn in.
No—it was as if I wasn't even allowed to breathe.
It was then... that I first understood.
...The person standing before me... was not Ryuugu Rena.
...Then... who was it, standing in front of me?
...Who was this person wearing Ryuugu Rena's face?!
For what felt like long enough to suffocate, this person had quite literally stolen the breath from my lungs...
``Right?``
And then she broke into the same gentle smile Rena always wore.
...Despite it being Rena's usual, soft smile... I remained frozen solid.
Rena brought her face closer.
Her breath grazed my skin.
...There was no flutter of excitement whatsoever.
This person with Rena's face was going to bite my nose right off...!!
...That thought locked every muscle in my body.
Then... as if she could see right through me, she gave a slow, knowing smirk.
``Just as Keiichi-kun has his secrets from us... we have ours from you, you know?``
With Rena's usual smile on her lips...
...but the eyes of a hawk.
...She brought her face close enough that our noses nearly touched... and 'gently' lectured me.
I couldn't nod. I couldn't shake my head.
All I knew was that this person in front of me... this someone who looked like Rena... terrified me beyond reason.
The sound of my own nervous swallow seemed so loud I feared she could hear it.
After a silence that felt like eternity... she finally spoke.
``Let's go.@k@vS01/02/120200143. ...It's gotten pretty chilly.``
It was Rena.
She smiled at me once more, then turned on her heel and began walking as if nothing had happened.
...The moment I was freed from her gaze, my knees buckled and I sank gracelessly to the ground...
...In the end, I couldn't move a single finger until Rena's silhouette had disappeared from view.
``...Who was... that just now...?``
...My entire body was drenched in cold, clammy sweat.
I finally squeezed a voice from the back of my throat and asked myself once more.
Who was that... that person... with Ryuugu Rena's face?!
